block1.comment: m17149975 is a single-block sr=60 collision (datasets/certificates/sr60_n32_m17149975.yaml). Block-1 alone produces zero state diff at round 63. Block-2 is a no-op absorption: any message works because the chain-state diff entering block-2 is already zero.

chain_state_input.comment: Block-1's residual_state_diff is all zero; block-2 starts with zero chain-state diff.

target_diff_at_round_N.comment: Block-2 round-63 zero target: trivially satisfied because zero diff in propagates to zero diff out under any (m2 = m2') choice.

metadata.purpose: Spec validation forcing function: instantiates v1 schema using the m17149975 verified collision (from headline_hunt/datasets/certificates/sr60_n32_m17149975.yaml). When build_2block_certpin.py is implemented, this bundle is the regression test — should return SAT trivially.
